reasoning: Victor Ponta is not currently listed as a candidate for the highly-anticipated December 7, 2025, mayoral by-election in Bucharest, and there is no evidence he intends to run. In recent political events, he ran for President in May 2025 (winning roughly 13% of the vote as an independent after being expelled from the PSD). Polling data specifically targeted at the December 2025 mayoral race, including an Avangarde poll from late October 2025, lists Daniel Băluță, Ciprian Ciucu, Cătălin Drulă, Anca Alexandrescu, and others as the prominent competitors, completely omitting Victor Ponta. This confirms that he is neither a central contender nor a declared candidate with less than two months until the election. The Polymarket market price on Oct 16 was 0.00, aligning with my findings. Therefore, I place his chances at the minimum allowable threshold of 0.02.
